reasoning: The control AC-4(23) focuses on ensuring secure information flow, particularly modifying non-releasable information during transfer. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring secure transport of data through various mechanisms. NetworkPolicies can enforce secure transport by restricting traffic to only use secure protocols. Ingress resources should have TLS enabled to ensure secure data transfer. Service meshes like Istio or Linkerd can enforce mTLS for secure communication between services. Admission controllers can be used to enforce policies that ensure secure transport configurations are in place.
title: Information Flow Enforcement - Information flow enforcement | modify non - releasable information when transfer
